headline: Nike gets World Cup opportunity it can’t afford to waste
summary: Nike (NKE) is entering the World Cup with one of the biggest marketing opportunities in sports. The brand has new football boots, new federation shirts, a global campaign, and thousands of revamped store displays tailored around sport’s biggest stage. That should be a great situation for a brand ...
